glm-asr-2512.pricingNotes: Z.AI lists GLM ASR 2512 at $0.144/hour. Free quotas, discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

limits.notes: GLM ASR supports wav and mp3 uploads, with a 25 MB file cap and 30-second audio-duration cap. AutoShow pre-splits longer audio and retries with split transcription if the provider rejects an oversized payload.
